products.title: Natural Habitat Print Issue No. 1
products.description: From actor and BÉIS founder Shay Mitchell to interior designer Jake Arnold, the debut print issue of our in-house magazine is packed with thought-provoking articles, stunning imagery, and sophisticated, playful design. You’ll be proud to put it on display. Note: this item is final sale.

products.title: Glow Diffuser
products.description: Elevate your home ambiance with the enchanting Glow Diffuser. Designed to naturally scent your space with 100% pure essential oils, this diffuser also features a light-up body that creates a soft, ambient glow. The Glow Diffuser features an 8-hour run time, ensuring long-lasting fragrance throughout your day. Experience the perfect blend of functionality and style with the Glow Diffuser.

products.description: A replacement power cord for our Stone Diffuser. Compatible with North American outlets; residents in the UK and Australia will require an adapter.

products.title: Cloud Humidifier
products.description: Elevate your sleep and beauty routine with the Cloud Humidifier. Whisper-quiet and designed for optimal performance, it provides a continuous cool mist that hydrates your skin and hair, promoting a dewy complexion and silky locks. With settings ranging from 8 to 24 hours and a light-free night mode, it ensures undisturbed, restful sleep. Safe for kids and easy to clean with a dishwasher-safe water

products.title: Humidifier Filters
products.description: These filters, made of ceramic and recycled plastic, capture minerals found in tap water to create a cleaner humidifier mist. For best results, change your Cloud Humidifier Filter every 3 months.

products.title: Humidity Sensor
products.description: Maintain optimal humidity levels in your home with this simple sensor. Featuring a built-in thermometer, it’s compact and so easy to use. Tip: it pairs well with the Cloud Humidifier .
